## Problem

What workflow should this improve?

## Proposed behavior

What should the extension do?

## Constraints

VS Code does not currently expose stable APIs for native Terminal Explorer row coloring, decoration, sorting, or arbitrary-terminal renaming. If the request depends on one of those capabilities, note whether a workaround would still be useful.
